meta.title: Interest Calculator - Calculate Your Savings Interest
meta.description: Easily calculate your savings interest with our free interest calculator. Compare accounts, view your portfolio and plan your financial future.

guide.feature6: Portfolio overview with monthly interest tracking
guide.step1Detail: Deposit, rate, duration, start date, interest type, and calculation method.
guide.step2Detail: Optional: schedule deposits and withdrawals and adjust rates over time.
guide.step3Detail: Accrued interest, balance, and payouts per period — including today's status.
guide.step4Detail: Combine multiple accounts and compare total interest earnings.

footer.privacyText: Interest-Calculator runs entirely in your browser. Your data is stored locally on your device and is never sent to a server. No cookies are placed and no tracking takes place. Note: exported files contain all your account data — store them in a safe place and do not share them unintentionally.
footer.disclaimerText: Interest-Calculator is a tool for indicative interest calculations. No rights can be derived from the displayed amounts, calculations, and overviews. Always consult your bank or financial advisor for definitive figures. The creator of this application is not liable for any inaccuracies or decisions based on these calculations.

accounts.emptyDescription: Add your first account or import a previously saved file.
accounts.confirmDeleteMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this account?
accounts.balanceInfo: Your current balance: the initial deposit plus all deposits minus all withdrawals. With compound interest, paid-out interest is included.
accounts.disbursedInfo: Interest that has actually been paid out on the payout dates up to and including today.
accounts.accruedInfo: Interest that has accrued since the last payout but has not yet been paid out. This amount grows daily.
accounts.interestThisMonthInfo: The calculated interest for the current calendar month, based on your balance, interest rate and day count convention.

form.useCustomEndDate: Specify end date instead of duration
form.variableRateHint: You can add rate changes in the overview.
form.cashFlowsHint: You can add deposits and withdrawals in the overview.
form.dayCountHint: For accurate calculations: choose the convention your bank uses. This can be found in the product information sheet under 'Interest calculation'.
form.errorStartDateRequired: Enter a start date for an ongoing account
form.errorStartDateMissing: Please also enter a start date
form.errorEndDateBeforeStart: End date must be after start date
form.errorMinDuration: Duration must be at least 1 month

portfolio.title: Portfolio
portfolio.emptyHint: Add accounts to your portfolio using the star ★ on each account.

exportModal.title: Export data
exportModal.warning: The export file contains all your account data. Store it in a safe place and do not share it unintentionally. Delete the file when you no longer need it.
exportModal.cloudHint: Note: your downloads folder may automatically sync with cloud services such as iCloud, Google Drive, or OneDrive.

importModal.title: Import data
importModal.modeQuestion: What would you like to do?
importModal.replaceDesc: Existing data will be deleted and replaced by the import.
importModal.mergeDesc: New accounts will be added to your existing data.

clearData.title: Clear all data
clearData.message: This will permanently delete all accounts, your portfolio, and theme settings. This cannot be undone.

accountType.label: Account type
accountType.hint: Automatically fills in the advanced settings. Without a preset you can configure everything yourself.

dayCount.nom12Desc: Nominal on annual basis: monthly interest = 1/12 of the annual rate, regardless of the number of days in the month. Most commonly used by Dutch banks.
dayCount.actActDesc: Actual number of days per month, 365 or 366 days per year. Used by e.g. Swedish banks (Lea Bank, Brocc).
dayCount.act365Desc: Actual number of days per month, always 365 days per year (even in a leap year).
dayCount.thirty360Desc: Every month counts as 30 days, every year as 360 days. Used by e.g. German banks (BW-Bank).

detail.notFoundDescription: The account you are looking for does not exist or has been deleted.
